recipe.title: base for a soup. V\Se a V\.kj Le~over vu.eat LV\, saLClcls, soups a~

steps.instruction: to remove any excess salt 1 onion, peeled and roughly chopped 2 carrots, peeled and roughly chopped 1 bay leaf 5 cloves 1 tsp black peppercorns l 20g dried yellow split peas, soaked overnight in cold water a generous knob of butter salt and freshly ground white pepper For the mustard sauce 30g butter 2 large shallots, peeled and finely chopped 20g plain flour 1 tbsp Tewkesbury mustard, or more to taste 300ml ham cooking liquor 2 tbsp double cream 1 tbsp chopped parsley
